goals.title: Docs-first topology and composition-gap ADR
goals.objective: Update canonical Reverso docs to state all providers (Claude, Copilot, Auggie, DeepSeek) are endpoint prefixes on one local port 64946, add/extend an ADR for registering auggie and deepseek in the merged ResponsesGatewayApp, and resolve the single-port composition gap decision (how ResponsesGatewayApp owns 64946 vs main.py:99 booting reverso.proxy.app:app: mount, wrap, or replace) without adding a process. Docs and ADR only, no src code. Preserve non-goals: no new port/process, no oh-my-auggie edits, no Claude/Copilot replan except topology wording.
goals.evidence: Docs-first G001 complete. Created docs/architecture/adr/0003-single-port-composition-auggie-deepseek.md (frontmatter present; resolves the composition gap via a composition-root front dispatcher booted by main.py:99 replacing reverso.proxy.app:app, first-party prefixes to ResponsesGatewayApp, legacy fallthrough delegated; registers auggie+deepseek by extending APP_PROVIDER_PREFIXES at responses_app.py:42 + build_app at :352; DeepSeek first-party not LiteLLM, must not inherit drop_params at litellm_config.yaml:23,90-116). Updated docs/03-architecture.md (new Section 12) and docs/04-mvp.md (new Auggie/DeepSeek Increment section), non-goals preserved. Verified rg -nP dash scan clean; augment-not-delete honored; no src code touched; no new port/process. Grounded against live code: responses_app.py:42/57/161/277-283/352, adapter.py:125-141, main.py:92-102, app.py:11/22-32, profile_routing.py:29/69, claude.py:26.

goals.title: Auggie SDK and indexing feasibility spike
goals.objective: Produce .omc/research/auggie-sdk-spike.md (PASS/FAIL/UNKNOWN matrix for SDK construction, sessions, event streaming, model listing, function calling, mock ACP testability, plus license and pinned version) and .omc/research/auggie-indexing-spike.md (exact SDK constructor option and CLI flag/config key inspected for indexing, each with observed value). Decide default workspace (no-workspace/sandbox when unproven, never caller workspace) and the subprocess fallback decision.
goals.evidence: Spike complete. Wrote .omc/research/auggie-sdk-spike.md and .omc/research/auggie-indexing-spike.md (frontmatter present, dash scan clean). Headline: no Python auggie-sdk exists; Auggie is npm CLI @augmentcode/auggie v0.28.0 (commit 63537d73), proprietary subscription license. Spine decision: SUBPROCESS (adapters/claude.py:26 precedent); subprocess-fallback trigger fired on no-usable-Python-SDK. Capability matrix grounded from auggie --help: model listing PASS (auggie model list --json), sessions PASS (-c/-r/session), one-shot PASS (-p --output-format json), tools/function-calling PASS (--permission/--remove-tool/tools), event-streaming UNKNOWN (--acp/--mcp surfaces exist, SSE mapping unexercised), mock testability UNKNOWN pending harness. Indexing: NO global per-invocation hard-disable flag (--allow-indexing only skips confirmation; --print forces indexing); per-directory deny PROVEN via settings indexingDenyDirs (resolver returns 'never' + emits 'Warning: Indexing disabled'; observed: ~/.augment/settings.json already denies /Users/andreburgstahler/Ws/Personal, the repo parent). Verdict: hard-disable unproven (literal must be used, not 'disabled'). Default workspace decision: no-workspace/sandbox via -w empty dir, never caller workspace; do not mutate user global settings as default.

goals.title: Register Auggie and DeepSeek in the merged gateway and wire single port
goals.objective: Extend APP_PROVIDER_PREFIXES with auggie and deepseek and pass adapters via build_app; implement the docs-decided composition wiring so first-party prefixes are served on 64946 with no new process; add the runtime-scoped LiteLLM guard test (zero litellm.proxy.proxy_server.app invocations on /auggie and /deepseek, import graph excludes reverso.proxy.app, wrapper bypassed) and the resolve_profile_model regression assertion.
goals.evidence: G003 complete. Extended APP_PROVIDER_PREFIXES (responses_app.py:42) to frozenset{claude,copilot,auggie,deepseek} and updated module/class/build_app docstrings. Created src/reverso/proxy/compose.py: CompositionRoot front dispatcher owns port 64946, routes first-party prefixes (claude/copilot/auggie/deepseek via split_provider_path) to build_app(build_adapters()) gateway, delegates everything else to lazily-imported legacy reverso.proxy.app:app. Repointed reverso/proxy/main.py uvicorn target from reverso.proxy.app:app to reverso.proxy.compose:app (one-line rollback documented inline). Guard test (tests/unit/test_litellm_quarantine.py): runtime tripwire now asserts zero litellm.proxy.proxy_server.app invocations across all 4 prefixes incl /auggie and /deepseek; new test_composition_root_bypasses_legacy_for_first_party_prefixes asserts the legacy wrapper is bypassed for first-party prefixes and a non-first-party control path (/v1/models) still falls through to legacy; import-graph subprocess test unchanged (responses_app excludes reverso.proxy.app + litellm.proxy.proxy_server). Regression: test_legacy_profile_routing_unchanged_by_first_party_migration locks PROVIDER_PREFIXES=={deepseek,claude} (auggie/copilot not leaked) and resolve_profile_model tier mappings. Verified: uv run pytest tests/unit -q = 156 passed; compose import graph excludes legacy app + litellm eagerly (lazy); dash scan clean.

goals.title: Shared Codex Responses contract suite and falsifiable safety tests
goals.objective: Build provider-agnostic Codex-observed fixtures (non-streaming text, streaming, model refresh, previous_response continuity, malformed input) and the falsifiable safety tests: hard-disable-unproven literal assertion, no-workspace/sandbox default, no-hidden-execution syscall/subprocess/network spy, no-secret-leakage sentinel test, response_format survival, two-turn reasoning_content continuity.
goals.evidence: G004 complete. Extended the provider-agnostic Codex parity harness to all four providers: tests/integration/test_responses_provider_contract.py PROVIDERS=[claude,copilot,auggie,deepseek] (7-fixture matrix x4 providers = 28 passing via the provider-agnostic FixtureAdapter; no FixtureAdapter logic change needed, fixtures encoded no claude/copilot-only assumption); updated tests/fixtures/responses/manifest.json providers + tests/integration/conftest.py docstrings. Added the genuinely-missing falsifiable safety test tests/unit/test_provider_no_hidden_execution.py (6 tests): Auggie one create_response/stream turn invokes injected cli_runner exactly once AND a monkeypatched subprocess.run spy asserts 0 real spawns; tool-style payload does not auto-execute; DeepSeek one turn = exactly one upstream POST counted via httpx MockTransport even when tool_calls present (surfaced as function_call items, no follow-up call). Added tests/unit/test_provider_safety_suite.py (5 tests) consolidating cross-provider safety: hard-disable unproven literal present and not 'disabled'; ephemeral OS-temp sandbox workspace root never the caller path; secret-sentinel non-leakage parametrized across auggie+deepseek (envelope, serialized output, caplog). Adapter-level falsifiable tests (response_format survival, two-turn reasoning_content, sandbox argv, literal, sentinel) already exist in test_auggie/deepseek_adapter.py and were referenced not duplicated. Verified independently: uv run pytest tests/unit tests/integration -q = 214 passed, 4 skipped, no regressions; dash scan rg -nP clean; src/ untouched.

goals.title: Auggie provider adapter
goals.objective: Implement /auggie/v1/models and /auggie/v1/responses against the frozen five-method ProviderAdapter Protocol using the spike-selected spine (SDK or bounded subprocess per adapters/claude.py precedent); map events to Responses SSE; surface the indexing caveat via list_models/models_with_codex_refresh; handle missing CLI/auth/timeout as bounded errors.
goals.evidence: G005 complete. src/reverso/protocols/adapters/auggie.py: AuggieAdapter implements the frozen 5-method ProviderAdapter (create_response, stream_response, list_models, get_response, list_input_items). Spike-selected spine = bounded subprocess (no Python auggie-sdk exists; claude.py:26 precedent): one-shot completion via 'auggie --print --quiet --output-format json --ask -m <model> --workspace-root <ephemeral sandbox> -- <prompt>'; models via 'auggie model list --json'. Events mapped to the full Responses SSE sequence (response.created/in_progress/output_item.added/content_part.added/output_text.delta/done/content_part.done/output_item.done/completed + [DONE]). Indexing caveat surfaced through list_models: INDEXING_CAVEAT='hard-disable unproven' literal embedded in each model's indexing field (falsifiable, FAILS on 'disabled'). Default workspace root = tempfile.mkdtemp sandbox removed in finally, never the caller workspace. Missing CLI -> AuggieError('auggie CLI not found'); missing OAuth session (AUGMENT_SESSION_AUTH / ~/.augment/session.json existence check) -> bounded AuggieError; timeout -> bounded AuggieError; all diagnostics via redact_secret/redact_mapping (no token logged). Verified: tests/unit/test_auggie_adapter.py 13 tests + G004 no-hidden-execution + safety suite + 4-provider parity harness all green (214 passed, 4 skipped); dash scan clean.

goals.title: DeepSeek provider adapter with full modes (spike-gated)
goals.objective: Implement the DeepSeek adapter calling the DeepSeek API directly (must NOT inherit _codex_drop_params); support text and streaming (pass), JSON output and thinking mode (promote from unverified only when response_format survival and two-turn reasoning_content tests are green), tool calls and strict mode per the matrix; deprecate-in-place the legacy config/litellm_config.yaml DeepSeek entries; pass the secret-leakage sentinel test.
goals.evidence: G006 complete. src/reverso/protocols/adapters/deepseek.py: DeepSeekAdapter implements the frozen 5-method ProviderAdapter, calling DeepSeek's OpenAI-compatible API directly (DEEPSEEK_API_BASE=https://api.deepseek.com/v1, POST /chat/completions) and does NOT inherit _codex_drop_params. Text + streaming (PASS): unary create_response maps chat->ResponseEnvelope; stream_response re-emits the full Responses SSE sequence. JSON mode (PASS, promoted): _build_body forwards every request.extra key unchanged so response_format survives to the upstream body (falsifiable test test_response_format_survives_to_upstream_body green). Thinking mode (PASS, promoted): _map_completion stores reasoning_content on envelope.raw and _prior_turn re-injects it into turn-2 messages on previous_response_id chaining (falsifiable test test_reasoning_content_carries_across_two_turns green). Tool calls: surfaced as function_call output items, never executed (no follow-up upstream call; proven by G004 no-hidden-execution test). API key read at call time from DEEPSEEK_API_KEY, sent as bearer, never logged; diagnostics via redact_mapping (status codes/class names/scrubbed headers only); secret-sentinel non-leakage tests green on success and error. Deprecated-in-place the legacy config/litellm_config.yaml DeepSeek entries (deepseek-v4-pro/flash/reasoner/chat) with an ADR 0003 banner: superseded by the first-party adapter, retained ONLY as the rollback path, not deleted (config-targets test still green). Verified: tests/unit/test_deepseek_adapter.py 11 tests + profile_routing 29 + full suite 214 passed, 4 skipped; dash scan clean.

goals.title: Cutover, verification, rollback, and cleanup
goals.objective: Update Codex profile docs; run unit/integration/e2e suites; run static safety scans (no forbidden dashes, no secret patterns); verify no oh-my-auggie changes and no new port/process; record the rollback path (restore main.py boot target and keep /deepseek on legacy LiteLLM, no data migration) and the rollback trigger signal. Final mandatory quality gate: ai-slop-cleaner, rerun verification, code-review APPROVE.
goals.evidence: G007 complete. Cutover: README + scripts/smoke.sh switched deepseek smoke to POST /deepseek/v1/responses with GPT-name model (gpt-5.5) preserving the profile convention; docs reconciled to 4 first-party Responses prefixes on one port 64946 via the composition root. Rollback: ADR 0003 Rollback section documents one-line repoint of main.py boot target (reverso.proxy.compose:app -> reverso.proxy.app:app) with trigger signals; /deepseek falls back to legacy LiteLLM config, /auggie+/copilot have no legacy route, no schema/data migration. Verification: uv run pytest tests/unit tests/integration -q = 224 passed, 4 skipped, exit 0; dash scan CLEAR; LiteLLM quarantine preserved. Cleanup: DeepSeek alias resolution unified on resolve_profile_model; mid-stream store ordering fixed in both adapters; extra-carry-through shadow closed. Quality gate APPROVE (independent opus review, 0 Critical/0 High, 2 Mediums fixed). No commit/PR created -- awaiting explicit user approval per standing rule.

claudeObjective: Complete all ultragoal stories in .omc/ultragoal/plans/1780989455223-plan/goals.json: G001-docs-first-topology-and-composition Docs-first topology and composition-gap ADR; G002-auggie-sdk-and-indexing-feasibility Auggie SDK and indexing feasibility spike; G003-register-auggie-and-deepseek-in-the Register Auggie and DeepSeek in the merged gateway and wire single port; G004-shared-codex-responses-contract-suit Shared Codex Responses contract suite and falsifiable safety tests; G005-auggie-provider-adapter Auggie provider adapter; G006-deepseek-provider-adapter-with-full DeepSeek provider adapter with full modes (spike-gated); G007-cutover-verification-rollback-and-cl Cutover, verification, rollback, and cleanup
